pi_items.source: /workspace/scripts/install_openbci.sh downloads v5.2.2 from the official GitHub repository.
task.json and setup_task.sh confirm the goal is to add the FFT Plot widget after the setup script removes it.
Subjective claim with no objective reference.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates in OpenBCI GUI v5.2.2 on an active synthetic EEG session. The initial setup deliberately removes the default FFT Plot widget by replacing it with a Head Plot widget. The agent must successfully navigate the UI to add the FFT Plot back into one of the widget panels.
